# EliteMD - The Doctor Directory (Full Reference)

> A curated directory of 7,402+ peer-verified doctors and surgeons across 15 specialties in 47 US states.

## About

EliteMD (thedoctordirectory.com) is a medical specialist directory that helps patients find world-class doctors. Each doctor is verified through peer review, with profiles displaying publications, patents, procedure volume, ratings, and whether they accept travel patients.

## Site Structure

### Core Pages
- Homepage: https://thedoctordirectory.com/
- Find a Doctor: https://thedoctordirectory.com/find-a-doctor
- Specialties Index: https://thedoctordirectory.com/specialties/
- For Doctors: https://thedoctordirectory.com/for-doctors
- Doctor Signup: https://thedoctordirectory.com/doctor-signup
- How It Works: https://thedoctordirectory.com/how-it-works
- About: https://thedoctordirectory.com/about
- Contact: https://thedoctordirectory.com/contact
- HIPAA Compliance: https://thedoctordirectory.com/hipaa
- Privacy Policy: https://thedoctordirectory.com/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://thedoctordirectory.com/terms

### 7,402+ Doctor Profile Pages
- URL format: https://thedoctordirectory.com/doctors/dr-firstname-lastname-ID
- Each profile includes: name, specialty, sub-specialty, location, ratings, publications, patents, procedure count, years of experience, travel availability

## Doctor Verification Criteria

Doctors are evaluated on:
1. Peer reviews and ratings
2. Published research (publications count)
3. Medical patents
4. Procedure volume
5. Years of active practice
6. Board certifications
7. Sub-specialty training

## Key Statistics
- 7,402+ verified specialists
- 15 medical specialties
- 87 medical conditions covered
- 47 US states represented
- 2,231+ travel-ready doctors

## Contact
- Website: https://thedoctordirectory.com
- Contact page: https://thedoctordirectory.com/contact
